ogTitle: Ottoway vs Overland Corner: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ottoway and Overland Corner.
heading: Ottoway vs Overland Corner — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ottoway, South Australia and Overland Corner, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Overland Corner has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Ottoway (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ottoway or Overland Corner safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ottoway has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Overland Corner scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ottoway scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Overland Corner scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ottoway or Overland Corner?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Overland Corner has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
